title: Kaemingk Decoris Shatterproof Christmas Baubles Red Matte & Shiny Tree Ornaments, 100% Recycled Plastic Durable Xmas Decorations for Christmas Tree & Festive Home Décor Baubles Set of 6, 8cm
features: Premium Shatterproof Baubles – Made from 100% recycled plastic, these ornaments offer the look of real glass while being safe, durable, and shatter-resistant.
Elegant Red Finish – Includes a mix of shiny and matte baubles for a rich, stylish look that enhances any Christmas tree or festive display.
Set of 6 Large Ornaments – Each bauble measures 8 cm (3.1 inches) in diameter, the ideal size for medium to large Christmas trees.
Lightweight & Easy to Hang – Designed for effortless decorating on trees, wreaths, garlands, or home décor arrangements without weighing down branches.
Perfect for Festive Home Décor – Great for Christmas trees, holiday events, seasonal crafts, and creating a warm, elegant festive atmosphere.
Safe for Family & Pets – Shatterproof material reduces the risk of breakage, making them an excellent choice for households with children or pets.
description: Add elegance and safety to your festive décor with the Kaemingk Decoris Shatterproof Christmas Baubles Set. Designed with a premium blend of shiny and matte red finishes, these 8 cm (3.1 inch) baubles bring sparkle and sophistication to any Christmas tree. Crafted from 100% recycled plastic, they offer the traditional glass-look beauty while remaining fully shatterproof, making them ideal for homes with children, pets, or busy holiday environments. Durable, lightweight, and easy to hang, this set of 6 ornaments is perfect for decorating Christmas trees, wreaths, garlands, or festive displays around your home, office, or event space. Whether you’re creating a classic, modern, or luxury holiday theme, these baubles blend seamlessly with a wide range of seasonal décor styles.
